allow: Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('public/mock/boss-home.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\('briefing:', JSON.stringify\(d.data.briefing,null,2\)\); console.log\('projects keys:', Object.keys\(d.data.projects\)\); console.log\('reimbursements[0]:', JSON.stringify\(d.data.reimbursements[0],null,2\)\);")
